title: aglaia domestica
intro: Aglaia domestica, also known as the Malabar gooseberry or the aglaia tree, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Aglaia domestica include its potential to prevent cancer, reduce inflammation, and lower cholesterol levels, as well as its use in treating various diseases such as malaria, fever, and respiratory infections. Aglaia domestica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
